generated_oml:
// C1: Physical Sensing Components
instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring temperature at hottest position (initially bottom, later repositioned to top) with range -55°C to +125°C and ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C range)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureMeasurementPermafrostHot
]

instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 sensor measuring temperature at coldest position (initially top, later repositioned to bottom) with range -55°C to +125°C and ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C range)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureMeasurementPermafrostCold
]

instance RoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External DS18S20 sensor measuring room temperature (replaced T1 in experiments) with range -55°C to +125°C and ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C range)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RoomTemperatureMeasurement
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Surface heat source (214 mm × 214 mm × 3 mm) delivering ≥100W power to heat air inside styrofoam box, actuated via MOSFETs and optocouplers for current separation (4A required)"
]

instance AirCirculationFan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V DC fan circulating airflow at 0.02 m³/s to ensure uniform temperature distribution inside the styrofoam box"
]

// C3: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction Data Flow
instance TemperatureMeasurementPermafrostHot : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PermafrostTemperatureSensor1
]

instance TemperatureMeasurementPermafrostCold : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PermafrostTemperatureSensor2
]

instance RoomTemperatureMeasurement : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomTemperatureSensor
]

instance HeatbedStatusCommand : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedActuator
]

instance FanStatusCommand : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirCirculationFan
]

instance PowerInputMeasurement : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedActuator
    DTDFVocab:measurementType "voltage/current profiles" // Removed invalid property
]

// C4: Data
instance RawTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature measurements (T2, T3, external) collected via low-level driver and shared with DT via RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureMeasurementPermafrostHot, TemperatureMeasurementPermafrostCold, RoomTemperatureMeasurement
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LowLevelDriver
]

instance SystemStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "System states (heatbed/fan status commands) logged for model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedStatusCommand, FanStatusCommand
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LowLevelDriver
]

instance PowerData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Power input data (voltage/current profiles) collected via low-level driver and shared with DT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PowerInputMeasurement
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LowLevelDriver
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance FirstOrderThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "First-order thermal model with 2 free parameters (_C_air and _G_box_) describing energy transfer between air inside the box and room environment. Assumes all electrical power converted to heat (Assumption 4)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQServer, PythonNonLinearSolver
]

instance ExtendedThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Extended thermal model with 4 free parameters (_C_air, _G_box, C_heater, G_heater_) accounting for heatbed's thermal inertia. Calibrated to predict thermal inertia of the heatbed"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQServer, PythonNonLinearSolver
]

instance CalibrationValidationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Experimental results including temperature profiles, sensor discrepancies (≤7°C max difference in Fig. 10) for model validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawTemperatureData, SystemStateData, PowerData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationTool
]

// C11: Enablers
instance RabbitMQServer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source, lightweight RabbitMQ message broker enabling real-time synchronization between physical twin and digital twin components via 1-Wire bus communication"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B handling GPIO, Wi-Fi/Bluetooth, and low-level sensor/actuator abstraction for physical twin operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables LowLevelDriver
]

instance PythonNonLinearSolver : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy implementation for non-linear least squares optimization used in model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance LowLevelDriver : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Low-level driver abstracting sensor/actuator interfaces for data collection and command execution"
]

instance ControllerLogic : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bang-bang controller statechart logic (Fig. 8) implementing real-time temperature regulation via heatbed/fan control"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureRegulationService
]

instance VisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software tool visualizing experimental results (Figs. 10, 12) for model accuracy validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data collection service gathering temperature measurements (T2, T3, external) and system states via RabbitMQ communication"
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-linear least squares optimization service calibrating thermal models (Model A: 1 parameter Model B: 4 parameters) using Python Scipy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance TemperatureRegulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature regulation service implementing bang-bang controller to adjust heatbed/fan based on measured vs. target temperature"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureControlAction
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Experimental validation service analyzing temperature profiles and sensor discrepancies (≤7°C max difference) to verify model accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationReportInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters (_C_air, _G_box, C_heater, _G_heater) enabling dynamic adjustments for improved thermal modeling accuracy"
]

instance TemperatureControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed/fan status commands to maintain target temperature within specified range"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Experimental results showing temperature profiles and sensor discrepancies (≤7°C max difference in Fig. 10) validating model uniformity and accuracy"
]

// C12: Environment
instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HeatbedActuator, AirCirculationFan, PermafrostTemperatureSensor1, PermafrostTemperatureSensor2, RoomTemperatureSensor
]

instance StyrofoamBoxEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Insulated styrofoam container (0.03 m³ volume) housing the thermal system components"
    base:contains ThermalIncubatorEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT interacts with the PT via:
  - **Control commands**: Heatbed/fan actuation commands sent to the Raspberry Pi controller via RabbitMQ.
  - **Actuation mechanism**: MOSFETs and optocouplers decouple control signals from the Raspberry Pi to handle 4A current for the heatbed.
  - **Feedback loop**: DT uses a **bang-bang controller** (with parameters: LL, UL, H, C) to regulate temperature via:
    1. On/off cycles of the heatbed (H seconds).
    2. Waiting duration (C seconds) to prevent overshoot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is defined by:
  - **Sampling rate**: Low-level driver periodically reads sensor data (frequency not specified; inferred as **continuous** for real-time control).
  - **Control loop rate**: **H (heating duration)** and **C (waiting duration)** parameters dictate the loop frequency (e.g., **2 seconds per cycle** for H=C=2s).
  - **Model update rate**: Calibration occurs offline via experimental data collection (no real-time updates specified)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as:
  - **Centralized**: RabbitMQ server on Raspberry Pi acts as the core communication hub, synchronizing data between:
    - **Physical Twin (PT)**: Sensors, heatbed, fan.
    - **Digital Twin (DT)**: Calibration algorithms, monitoring, and control logic.
  - **Components**:
    1. Communication server (RabbitMQ).
    2. Low-level driver (sensor/actuator abstraction).
    3. Controller (bang-bang logic, Fig. 8)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **As designed**: Thermal models (Model A/B) are developed and calibrated (Section 3).
  - **As manufactured**: Hardware (styrofoam box, heatbed, sensors) is validated for uniformity (Section 4.1).
  - **As operated**: Real-time control and monitoring during runtime (Section 2.2)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**:
    - Assumptions tested experimentally (e.g., uniform temperature via fan, Fig. 10/12).
    - Model accuracy validated via residual error minimization (least squares).
  - **Validation**:
    - Model B outperforms Model A by capturing heatbed thermal inertia (Section 3).
    - Temperature uniformity validated via sensor discrepancies (<7°C at 12V fan, <6°C at 18V fan)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin technical connection** uses the following protocols/architectures:
  1. **Physical-to-Virtual**:
     - **1-Wire bus** for sensor communication (DS18S20).
     - **GPIO pins** for actuator control (heatbed/fan).
  2. **Virtual-to-Physical**:
     - **RabbitMQ message broker** (via **TCP/IP** over Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) for real-time command/data exchange.
     - **Optocouplers** (hardware, not a protocol) decouple control signals from high-current actuation.
  The system leverages **local hosting** on the Raspberry Pi, with no explicit mention of cloud-based protocols."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted/deployed on:
  - **Hardware**: Raspberry Pi 4 Model B (local deployment).
  - **Software stack**:
    - RabbitMQ server (on-device).
    - Python-based calibration algorithms (local execution).
  - **Accessibility**: Open-source hardware/software repository ([GitHub](https://github.com/INTO-CPS-Association/example-incubator)) for reproducibility."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Safety**:
    - Optocouplers isolate Raspberry Pi control signals from high-current heatbed actuation (4A).
    - Safe protocol in low-level driver prevents unsafe device states.
  - **Cybersecurity**:
    - RabbitMQ is deployed on-device (local network) to mitigate external exposure.
    - No remote execution of DT commands on PT (human oversight required)."
]
